task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged in as GardenAdmin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The iDempiere web interface is visible with the user profile or login area showing 'GardenAdmin'.

task_completion.description: Verify a new GL Journal Batch is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'GL Journal Batch' window is open and a new batch record is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the first journal entry is created with the correct description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A journal entry with the description 'March 2026 Rent Accrual' is visible within the GL Journal Batch.

task_completion.description: Verify the lines for the Rent Accrual journal are correct.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Journal Line tab for the first journal shows a Debit of 3200.00 for Account 61100 (Rent Expense) and a Credit of 3200.00 for Account 21100 (Accounts Payable Trade).

task_completion.description: Verify the second journal entry is created with the correct description in the same batch.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A second journal entry with the description 'March 2026 Wages Accrual' is visible under the same GL Journal Batch.

task_completion.description: Verify the lines for the Wages Accrual journal are correct.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Journal Line tab for the second journal shows a Debit of 8500.00 for Account 60110 (Wages) and a Credit of 8500.00 for Account 22100 (Accrued Payroll).

task_completion.description: Verify the GL Journal Batch is posted/completed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GL Journal Batch window shows a Document Status of 'Completed' or 'Posted', indicating the batch has been successfully processed.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacted with the iDempiere web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal commands or direct SQL database inserts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the genuine application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the actual iDempiere ERP system with its standard layout, menus, and forms, not a text editor or a mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify both journals are in a single batch.
integrity.visual_evidence: Both the Rent Accrual and Wages Accrual journals are clearly visible as child records under the exact same GL Journal Batch, confirming they were not created as separate batches.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified required accounts: 61100 (Rent Expense), 21100 (Accounts Payable Trade), 60110 (Wages), and 22100 (Accrued Payroll). Journal 1 requires description 'March 2026 Rent Accrual', Debit 61100 $3200, Credit 21100 $3200. Journal 2 requires description 'March 2026 Wages Accrual', Debit 60110 $8500, Credit 22100 $8500. Both must be in a single GL Batch.
